title: Money20/20 Europe 2026 Part 1: Stablecoins, Agentic AI & the Rebundling of Finance
description: Live episode recorded on the LHV Bank stand at Money20/20 Europe, bringing together leaders across payments and fintech to explore stablecoins, agentic AI and the rebundling of finance.

title: Building Better FinTech Products Starts With Who You Hire
description: Guest on Nadia Edwards-Dashti's FinTech's DEI Discussions, recorded live at PAY360 2026, exploring how hiring practices and team diversity directly shape product innovation in financial technology.

title: Policy Modernisation & AI: The Forces Reshaping UK Payments (Part 2 of 3)
description: Conversation recorded at PAY360 2026 on the forces reshaping UK payments — policy modernisation, agentic finance and the technology evolution behind it.

title: Why AI creates knowledge debt and how leaders stay in control
description: Discussion about my route into tech and adopting AI in a regulated business.

title: Happily Married Product & Engineering Teams with Macs Dickinson
description: Podcast episode on byProduct Live discussing how product and engineering teams can work together effectively, featuring Macs Dickinson (LHV, ex-Flutter, SkyBet).

title: How to Build a Team with Head of Tech – Macs Dickinson
description: Discussion on building tech teams and career journeys in technology, featuring Macs Dickinson.
